senators.name: John Thune
senators.notNerdReason: B.A. from Biola University and M.B.A. from University of South Dakota. Senate Majority Leader — the highest-ranking Republican in Congress. MBA provides business analytical skills. Decades of legislative expertise in commerce, agriculture, and tax policy. Strong institutional knowledge but approach is more politically strategic than evidence-based.

senators.name: Mike Rounds
senators.notNerdReason: B.S. from South Dakota State University. Career in insurance, real estate, and state politics. Governor of South Dakota. Business background. No distinctly analytical or evidence-based policy approach.

SD-01.name: Dusty Johnson
SD-01.notNerdReason: B.A. and M.B.A. from University of South Dakota. Career as Public Utilities Commissioner, governor's chief of staff, and business executive. MBA and regulatory experience provide analytical skills. Known as pragmatic, bipartisan problem-solver but not distinctly evidence-based in legislative approach.
experience: Chief of Staff to Gov. Dennis Daugaard
